examples: I became embarrassed and huffy and told her to take the money back.
Similar huffy critiques came from the leaders of Egypt and Jordan.
Can't you see how huffy he got when the same thing happened last time?
This is a bit like not challenging a pickpocket because the poor fellow might get huffy.
Vera Farmiga has a hilarious bit as a huffy Balkan streetwalker wearing very little under her overcoat.
